acceptance_targets: [ch03_prose_001] Pass if the revised versions of the cited paragraphs reduce the repeated `because X and because Y` / `not X ... not Y ... just Z` pattern to no more than one instance across those targeted beats, while each paragraph still makes Marisol's motive legible on first read. Fail if multiple key beats still rely on the same qualifier-heavy sentence shape.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of the cited paragraphs reduce the repeated `because X and because Y` / `not X ... not Y ... just Z` pattern to no more than one instance across those targeted beats, while each paragraph still makes Marisol's motive legible on first read. Fail if multiple key beats still rely on the same qualifier-heavy sentence shape.
findings.evidence: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:3 (double-because motive sentence); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:5 (self-correcting negation: habit, not paranoia, not only habit); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:69 (double-because motive sentence); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:135 (double-because motive sentence); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211 (double-because motive sentence); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:255 (not defiance / not sympathy); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:283 (not hope exactly); snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:285 (nothing dramatic / just the little household matter).
findings.problem: The chapter reuses the same explanatory qualification machinery at too many major beats: doubled causal clauses ("because X and because Y") and self-correcting negation ("not X ... not Y ... just Z"). Each instance works locally, but together they make Marisol's close-third intelligence feel patterned rather than freshly pressured, flattening rhythm exactly where the chapter wants surprise and force.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the sentence architecture in place at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:69, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:135, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:211, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:255, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:283, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:285. Keep Marisol's analytic cast of mind, but vary how motive and correction reach the page: let some beats resolve through action or sensory image, and let at least two of the cited negation ladders land as blunt positive statements instead of qualifying themselves into place.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
